# arifOS — Constitutional AI Governance Documentation

**The Intelligence Kernel that governs whether AI cognition is permitted.**
Mathematical enforcement of ethical constraints through 13 stationary floors (F1-F13) and thermodynamic stability.

> Motto: DITEMPA BUKAN DIBERI (Forged, Not Given)
> Version: 2026.02.17-FORGE-UVX-SEAL

## Core Documentation
- [Introduction](https://arifos.arif-fazil.com/docs/)
- [The 13 Constitutional Floors](https://arifos.arif-fazil.com/docs/theory/floors)
- [MCP Server Integration](https://arifos.arif-fazil.com/docs/governance/mcp-integration)
- [API Reference](https://arifos.arif-fazil.com/docs/api/reference)

## 26 Canonical MCP Tools
arifOS provides a suite of 26 tools for AGI governance, reality grounding, container orchestration, and system operations.

### Governance Verbs (The 9 Stages)
1. **anchor (000)**: Session ignition and authority verification (F11/F12).
2. **reason (222)**: Hypothesis generation and truth-score verification (F2/F8).
3. **integrate (333)**: Context mapping and knowledge grounding (F7/F10).
4. **respond (444)**: Draft synthesis and clarity verification (F4/F6).
5. **validate (555)**: Stakeholder impact and empathy scoring (F5/F6).
6. **align (666)**: Ethical constraint alignment (F9).
7. **forge (777)**: Implementation synthesis and code generation.
8. **audit (888)**: Verdict consensus and Tri-Witness scoring (F3/F13).
9. **seal (999)**: Immutable commitment to VAULT999 ledger (F1/F3).

### Container Orchestration (Guarded)
- **container_list**: List all managed AI containers.
- **container_restart**: Safely restart a specific container.
- **container_logs**: Retrieve real-time logs from isolated environments.
- **container_exec**: Execute commands within a sandboxed container.
- **sovereign_health**: High-level health of the container host.

### Utility & Ops Tools
- **system_health**: Real-time metrics (CPU, RAM, Disk, IO).
- **fs_inspect**: Managed filesystem security inspection.
- **log_tail**: Constitutional audit trail monitoring.
- **net_status**: Network environment analysis.
- **config_flags**: Dynamic governance state flags.
- **chroma_query**: Vector memory retrieval.
- **cost_estimator**: Thermodynamic cost prediction.
- **financial_cost**: External API cost tracking.
- **forge_guard**: Local safety circuit breaker.
- **trinity_forge**: Unified 000-999 pipeline execution.
- **search**: Multi-agent reality search.
- **fetch**: Source document retrieval.

## System Endpoints
- **Production MCP**: `https://arifosmcp.arif-fazil.com/mcp`
- **REST API**: `https://arifosmcp.arif-fazil.com`
- **Health Check**: `https://arifosmcp.arif-fazil.com/health`

## Infrastructure
- **VAULT999**: Merkle-chained PostgreSQL ledger for immutable auditing.
- **AXIOM Engine**: Thermodynamic grounding layer.
- **TRINITY**: Cognition (AGI), Safety (ASI), and Judicial (APEX) engines.
